chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7598 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 29.01.2025 M/s.Aqeel Ahmed Khan & M.Salman Khan, Advocates for the Petitioner. Mr.Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition may be disposed of with directions to the respondent Department to decide the application of the petitioner dated 29.05.2017, if still pending (available at page-51). He further states that pending aforesaid adjudication no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid. Petition is disposed of in the said terms. Judge Judge nasir
